name: Optical Fiber Communications
tagline: Dielectric waveguides carrying terabits on photons — low loss, high bandwidth, immunity to copper theft
problem:
Copper pairs attenuate and pick up EMI; coax thickens with distance. Glass fibres guide infrared light in total internal reflection with losses below 0.2 dB/km — enabling transoceanic routes without repeaters every kilometre. The problem is purity: ppm metal ions quench transparency; splices must align cores sub-micron; lasers must modulate GHz without chirp smearing pulses.

DWDM stacks dozens of lambdas on one fibre — turning spectrum economics into optical physics. Dispersion and nonlinearities limit reach; Raman amplification and coherent detection push thousands of kilometres.

Fibre is fragile — macrobends and dirty connectors dominate field faults more than cable theft.
overview:
Preforms are deposited with MCVD or OVD; drawn into fibre; coated with UV acrylate; cabled with strength members and gel. Lasers (DFB, tunable) launch into single-mode fibre at 1310/1550 nm windows. EDFA amplifiers boost WDM combes en route. Receivers use PIN or APD photodiodes then TIAs and DSPs in coherent systems.

PON access splits one feeder to hundreds of homes with passive splitters — GPON/XGS-PON standards govern bursts upstream.

Splicing uses fusion arcs; OTDR reflects locate breaks; cleaning sticks fix most ‘mysterious’ outages.

Dark fibre leases became financial instruments — idle strands as options on future bandwidth.

principles.name: V-number and modes
principles.explanation: Single-mode cutoff ensures one spatial mode — avoids modal dispersion.

principles.name: Material and waveguide dispersion
principles.explanation: Chromatic dispersion broadens pulses; dispersion-shifted fibre trades against nonlinear penalties.

principles.name: WDM crosstalk
principles.explanation: Imperfect filters leak neighbours; guard bands cost capacity.

principles.name: Shot noise limit
principles.explanation: Photons arrive Poisson — sensitivity floors for given BER.

buildSteps.title: Design span budget
buildSteps.description: Choose launch power, amplifier spacing, and FEC overhead; verify nonlinear SNI limit.

buildSteps.title: Install cable with bend radius
buildSteps.description: Mandrel tests; tensile during pull; splice trailers climate controlled.

buildSteps.title: Fusion splice and proof test
buildSteps.description: Core alignment; tensile proof; heat-shrink protectors.

buildSteps.title: Characterise PMD and CD
buildSteps.description: Field measurements for coherent provisioning; update DSP presets.
buildSteps.warningNote: Old fibre plant surprises new gear

buildSteps.title: Turn-up with loopbacks
buildSteps.description: BER tests; optical spectrum snapshots; alarm integration to NOC.
buildSteps.warningNote: Wrong wavelength channel wipes wrong customer

history.event: Low-loss fused silica fibre breakthrough at Corning.
history.person: Robert Maurer, Donald Keck, Peter Schultz

history.event: TAT-8 first transatlantic submarine fibre cable.

inventors.name: Charles K. Kao
inventors.contribution: Pioneering work on fibre communications feasibility

impact:
Fibre carries the bulk backbone of the internet — satellites and radio are edges; glass is the spine.

Understanding OTDR is understanding archaeology for light.
